nodes.label: Runtime Error Screenshot – CommunicationsView HMR failure
nodes.summary: Safari browser screenshot showing a Next.js 16.1.3 (Turbopack) Runtime Error. The error states that src/components/sanad/CommunicationsView.tsx was instantiated because it was required from src/app/page.tsx, but the module factory is not available — likely deleted during an HMR update. The call stack points to src/app/page.tsx line 17. The code panel shows page.tsx importing ClientsView, InvoicesView, ScannerView (highlighted at line 17), CalendarView, StudentView, and TodayFocusView from @/components/sanad/*.

nodes.label: src/app/page.tsx
nodes.summary: Main Next.js app page. At runtime error time, it imported ClientsView, InvoicesView, ScannerView, CalendarView, StudentView, TodayFocusView, and (causing the error) CommunicationsView from @/components/sanad/*.

nodes.label: src/components/sanad/CommunicationsView.tsx
nodes.summary: Sanad view component for communications. Was required by page.tsx but its module factory was unavailable at HMR update time — likely deleted or renamed, causing the runtime error.

nodes.label: src/components/sanad/ScannerView.tsx
nodes.summary: Sanad view component for scanner functionality, imported in page.tsx at line 17 (highlighted in error panel).

nodes.label: src/components/sanad/ClientsView.tsx
nodes.summary: Sanad view component for clients, imported in page.tsx at line 15.

nodes.label: src/components/sanad/InvoicesView.tsx
nodes.summary: Sanad view component for invoices, imported in page.tsx at line 16.

nodes.label: src/components/sanad/CalendarView.tsx
nodes.summary: Sanad view component for calendar, imported in page.tsx at line 18.

nodes.label: src/components/sanad/StudentView.tsx
nodes.summary: Sanad view component for student features, imported in page.tsx at line 19.

nodes.label: src/components/sanad/TodayFocusView.tsx
nodes.summary: Sanad view component for today's focus / daily tasks, imported in page.tsx at line 20.
